verification.target_vocab_notes: ドア appears with direction marker の方へ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはどあのほうへはしった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, possessive の, 方へ (direction toward), た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses の方へ direction pattern and past tense
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 sentence with direction pattern の方へ.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ドア appears as object of 開ける
verification.kana_notes: Shows ひらけた but should be あけた. 開けた is read as あけた, not ひらけた (which would be 開いた)
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple past tense sentence
verification.overall_notes: Kana error: 開けた should be あけた, not ひらけた. Grammar is fine.

verification.target_vocab_notes: みる appears in compound 目がある (has an eye for)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはえをみるめがある
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, verb みる, が subject, ある existence. Though 目がある is idiomatic, the grammar is N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: idiomatic expression 目がある (has an eye for), but grammar structures are N5
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically N5. The idiom adds difficulty but structure is acceptable.

verification.target_vocab_notes: みる appears in compound てみる (try doing)
verification.kana_notes: Shows いっってみると but should be いってみると (single っ). 行って not 行っって
verification.grammar_notes: Contains と conditional (入ってみると - when she tried entering), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with conditional と and past context
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 と conditional. Also has kana error with extra っ.

verification.target_vocab_notes: みる appears in compound てみる (try doing)
verification.kana_notes: Shows いっってみる but should be いってみる (single っ). 行って not 行っって
verification.grammar_notes: Contains だろう conjecture form (what shop is it, probably?), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with casual quoted speech and だろう
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 だろう conjecture. Also has kana error.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 交番 appears as location with で
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - むこうのこうばんできいてください
verification.grammar_notes: N5: demonstrative 向こう, possessive の, で location, て-form, ください request
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: te-form with ください, location marker
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 request pattern with て-ください.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 交番 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - こうばんはどこにあるかわかりますか
verification.grammar_notes: Contains か embedded question (どこにあるか - where it is), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex embedded question structure
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 embedded question with か.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 交番 appears as subject
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - こうばんがちかくにある
verification.grammar_notes: N5: が subject, location 近くに, ある existence
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple existence sentence with location
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 existence sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ナイフ appears with instrument marker で
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはないふでてをきった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, で instrument, を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses で for instrument/means
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with instrument particle で.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ナイフ appears with と particle (and fork)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはじょうずにないふとふぉーくをつかった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, adverb 上手に, と (and), を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: adverb usage, と conjunction, past tense
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with adverb and と conjunction.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ナイフ appears with instrument で
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはないふでにくをきった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, で instrument, を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward instrument usage
verification.overall_notes: Clear N5 with instrument particle.

verification.target_vocab_notes: つらい (painful/difficult) appears, but target is からい (spicy). These are different words with different kanji and meanings
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but wrong word - つらい not からい
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, adjective つらい, で cause, adverb とても, ている state. Grammar is N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid-upper N5 if vocab were correct
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - つらい (painful) not からい (spicy). False positive match.

verification.target_vocab_notes: つらい (painful/difficult) appears, not からい (spicy). Wrong word
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but wrong vocabulary
verification.grammar_notes: N5: が subject, い-adjective 痛い, て-form for cause
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 if vocab correct
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - つらい not からい. False positive.

verification.target_vocab_notes: つらい (painful/difficult) appears, not からい (spicy)
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but wrong word
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer creating embedded clause (起きるのが), which is N4 complexity
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex structure with N4 grammar
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary AND N4 grammar. Must reject.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 洋服 appears as object of 持つ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはかなりのようふくをもっている
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, かなりの (quite a lot of), を object, ている for possession state
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: かなり quantifier, ている for possession
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with quantifier and ている.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 洋服 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - とてもすてきなようふくですね
verification.grammar_notes: N5: adverb とても, な-adjective すてきな, です copula, ね particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple compliment with な-adjective
verification.overall_notes: Nice N5 compliment pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: お洋服 appears with honorific prefix
verification.kana_notes: Major error: shows ちゃくましょう but 着ましょう is きましょう not ちゃくましょう. Wrong reading for 着る
verification.grammar_notes: N5: honorific お, ましょう suggestion form, ね particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 if kana correct
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error: 着ましょう is きましょう, not ちゃくましょう.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 晩ご飯 appears (written as ご飯 in sentence)
verification.kana_notes: Shows ばんごめし but target is ばんごはん. The sentence has ご飯 (gohan) not ご飯 (gomeshi). Should be ばんごはん
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, past tense ました, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple past tense question
verification.overall_notes: Kana shows ごめし but should be ごはん. Minor reading variation.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 晩御飯 appears as time marker
verification.kana_notes: Shows ののち but the の after 晩御飯 should be の (possessive), then 後 is あと not のち. Should be ばんごはんのあと
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, time phrase の後, に direction, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: time phrase with の後, past tense
verification.overall_notes: Kana error: 後 should be あと not のち in this context. Grammar is fine.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 晩ご飯 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Shows ばんごめし but should be ばんごはん (gohan not gomeshi)
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, question word 何, implicit copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple question
verification.overall_notes: Kana reading variation: ごめし vs ごはん. Grammar is simple N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 車 appears in question
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - これはだれのくるまかしら
verification.grammar_notes: N5: これは, possessive の, か question, しら (feminine wondering particle but acceptable at N5)
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: possessive question with かしら ending
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 question with possessive の.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 車 appears with possessive の
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - いつでもわたしのくるまをかしてあげますよ
verification.grammar_notes: Contains あげます giving auxiliary (N4 grammar - giving/receiving verbs with て-form)
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid-upper N5 except for N4 あげます
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 てあげます pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 車 appears with possessive の
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あしたくんのくるまをかしてください
verification.grammar_notes: N5: time word 明日, possessive の, を object, て-form, ください request
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: request with てください
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 request pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ちょうど appears as adverb
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはちょうどかいものにでかけるところです
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, adverb ちょうど, に purpose, ところです (just about to). ところです is borderline but acceptable N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: ところです pattern for 'about to', に purpose
verification.overall_notes: ところです is borderline but commonly taught at N5. Acceptable.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ちょうど appears as adverb
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはちょうどわたしとおなじねんです
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, adverb ちょうど, と comparison, 同じ adjective, です copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: comparison with と, adverb usage
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 comparison sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ちょうど appears as adverb
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはたくしーでちょうどここへきたところだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, で means, adverb ちょうど, へ direction, past + ところだ (just finished). This is basic N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: ところだ pattern for 'just finished'
verification.overall_notes: たところだ is borderline but acceptable N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ポスト appears as location with に
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはぽすとにてがみをいれた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, に location, を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple past tense with location particle
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ポスト appears as location with に
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - てがみをわすれずにぽすとにいれてください
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ずに negative conjunction (without forgetting), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with N4 ずに pattern
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 ずに negative conjunction.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ポスト appears as subject
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このへんにぽすとってある
verification.grammar_notes: N5: この demonstrative, に location, って (casual quotative/topic marker), ある existence. Though って is casual, it's N5 level
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: casual speech with って
verification.overall_notes: Casual N5 sentence with って. Acceptable.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 服 appears as object of 脱ぐ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはふくをぬいでいる
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, ている progressive
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: ている progressive form
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with ている.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 服 appears as object of 着る
verification.kana_notes: Major error: shows ちゃくました but 着ました is きました not ちゃくました. Wrong reading for 着る
verification.grammar_notes: N5: を object, ました past, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be beginner N5 if kana correct
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error: 着ました is きました, not ちゃくました.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 服 appears with に particle
verification.kana_notes: Shows きん but should be かね. お金 is read as おかね not おきん
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, に target, たくさん quantifier, を object, dictionary form
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses に for target of spending, たくさん quantifier
verification.overall_notes: Kana error: 金 should be かね not きん. Grammar is N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: パン appears as object of 食べる
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはけさばたーつきのぱんをたべた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, time word 今朝, possessive の with つき, を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: time word, compound noun with つき (with), past tense
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with compound noun construction.

verification.target_vocab_notes: パン appears with counter
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはぱんをいっこかった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, counter 一個, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: counter usage with past tense
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with counter.

verification.target_vocab_notes: パン appears in compound バター付きパン
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはばたーつきぱんがすきだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, compound noun, が object of preference, 好き preference, だ copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: compound noun, preference pattern
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 preference sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 半 appears in compound 半㌔
verification.kana_notes: Major error: shows はんはん but 半㌔ should be はんキロ. The ㌔ is a single character for キロ, not another はん
verification.grammar_notes: N5: を object, ください request
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be beginner N5 if kana correct
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error: ㌔ symbol should be キロ, not はん.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 半 appears in time expression 一年半
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - いちねんはんまえ、わたしはもうすこしでしぬところだった
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ところだった (was about to), which is a complex N4 pattern. Also もう少しで (almost) creates complex structure
verification.difficulty_notes: Too complex with N4 patterns
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 ところだった pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 半 appears in compound 半ドア (half-open door)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - はんどあだよ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: compound noun 半ドア, だ copula, よ particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: compound noun, casual sentence ending
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with compound noun 半ドア.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 若い appears as predicate adjective
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - 「かのじょはわかいですか」「はい」
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, い-adjective 若い, です copula, か question, はい response
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple question and answer
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 Q&A pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 若い appears modifying 男の人
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わかいおとこのにんがどあのまえでうたっています
verification.grammar_notes: N5: い-adjective 若い modifying noun, が subject, location 前で, ている progressive
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: adjective modifier, location phrase, ている
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with adjective modification.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 若い appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ぼくはわかい
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, い-adjective 若い
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: very simple statement
verification.overall_notes: Very simple N5 sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 食べる appears in past form 食べた
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはけさばたーつきのぱんをたべた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, time word, possessive の, を object, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: time word, compound noun, past tense
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 past tense sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 食べる appears in べき form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - もっとくだものをたべるべきです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains べき (should/ought to), which is N4 grammar for obligation/advice
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for N4 べき
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 べき pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 食べる appears with に purpose marker
verification.kana_notes: Shows ごめし but should be ごはん. 昼ご飯 is ひるごはん not ひるごめし
verification.grammar_notes: N5: を object, に purpose, に location, negative ませんか invitation
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: に purpose, negative invitation pattern
verification.overall_notes: Kana variation: ごめし vs ごはん. Grammar is N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 警官 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Major error: shows ことおる but 女の子達 should be おんなのこたち. 達 is たち not とおる
verification.grammar_notes: Contains か embedded question (自分達のものであるか), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Very complex with embedded question
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 embedded question AND major kana error.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 警官 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - けいかんはとまれといった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, quoted command 止まれ, と quotative, た past. Though 止まれ is imperative, と言う is N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: quoted speech with imperative, but structure is N5
verification.overall_notes: Acceptable N5 quoted speech. 止まれと言った is within N5 range.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 警官 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - けいかんはくんになにかいいましたか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, に target, 何か (something), past tense ました, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward question with に target particle
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: これ appears as subject demonstrative
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - これはだれのくるまかしら
verification.grammar_notes: N5: これは, possessive の, か question, しら (feminine wondering)
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: possessive question with demonstrative
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 demonstrative usage.

verification.target_vocab_notes: これ appears as subject demonstrative
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - これはとてもまろやかなこーひーだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: これは, adverb とても, な-adjective まろやかな, だ copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: demonstrative with な-adjective and adverb
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with demonstrative and な-adjective.

verification.target_vocab_notes: これ appears as subject demonstrative
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - これはとてもきみょうなてがみです
verification.grammar_notes: N5: これは, adverb とても, な-adjective 奇妙な, です copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: demonstrative with な-adjective and adverb
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 demonstrative pattern.
